name: DAXOR CORP
summary: Daxor Corporation is a medical device manufacturing company providing biotechnology services. Its primary product is the BVA-100 Blood Volume Analyzer, used with the Volumex single-use radiopharmaceutical injection and collection kit to measure human blood volume with 98% accuracy within 60-90 minutes. The company also offers cryobanking services for blood and semen storage through subsidiaries Scientific Medical Systems and Idant, and manufactures next-generation BVA-100 models at its Oak Ridge, Tennessee facility.

products.name: BVA-100 Blood Volume Analyzer
products.description: CLIA-rated medium complexity instrument measuring human blood volume with 98% accuracy within 60-90 minutes, used for diagnosing heart failure, kidney failure, hypertension, and syncope.

products.name: Volumex
products.description: Single-use radiopharmaceutical diagnostic injection and collection kit using iodine-131 albumin tracer, used in conjunction with the BVA-100 Blood Volume Analyzer.

products.name: Cryobanking Services
products.description: Blood and semen storage services offered through subsidiaries Scientific Medical Systems and Idant.

partnerships.description: Performs injection kit filling for Daxor's Volumex kits.
